_note: Fixtures matching the IMMUTABLE live Sepolia deployment of HonestEarQuorum (0x05DAa5dc9C21f4d17e930a158A3fc636de5D1815). That contract was deployed from repo rev e47cf21 (audio+nonce-bound 2-of-2), BEFORE commit 25b89ff added the streaming-hash-chain prev_digest (CBOR key 10) that grew the device payload from a 10-map to an 11-map. The live bytecode is frozen at the 10-map schema, so the current onchain/test/quorum_fixture.json (11-map, used by the LOCAL forge test at the current schema) reverts 'not a 10-map' against it. These era-matched fixtures are what onchain/call-sepolia.sh feeds the live contract so the public-chain check actually verifies. Provenance: git show e47cf21:onchain/test/{proof,quorum}_fixture.json.
